allow: Bash(node -e "const data=require\('/tmp/album_detail.json'\); console.log\('歌曲数量:', data.data.length\); console.log\('歌曲列表:', data.data.map\(s => s.name\)\);")

Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const data=JSON.parse\(d\);console.log\('歌曲数量:', data.data.length\); data.data.slice\(0,5\).forEach\(s => console.log\('-', s.name\)\);}\)")

Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const data=JSON.parse\(d\); const song=data.data[0]; console.log\('字段:', Object.keys\(song\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('album字段:', song.album\);}\)")

Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const data=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('专辑数量:', data.data.length\); if\(data.data[0]\) console.log\('第一个专辑:', JSON.stringify\(data.data[0], null, 2\)\);}\)")

Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const data=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('歌曲数量:', data.data.length\); data.data.slice\(0,3\).forEach\(s => console.log\('-', s.name, '| 歌手:', s.full_name_singer || s.singer || '\(空\)', '| 专辑:', s.album\)\);}\)")

Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const data=JSON.parse\(d\); const album46=data.data.find\(a=>a.id===46\); if\(album46\) console.log\('找到专辑ID=46:', JSON.stringify\(album46, null, 2\)\); else console.log\('没有专辑ID=46，专辑ID列表:', data.data.map\(a=>a.id\).join\(', '\)\);}\)")

Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const data=JSON.parse\(d\); const song=data.data[0]; console.log\('full_name_singer:', song.full_name_singer\); console.log\('singer:', song.singer\);}\)")

Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const data=JSON.parse\(d\); data.data.forEach\(s => console.log\(s.name, '| full_name_singer:', s.full_name_singer, '| singer:', s.singer\)\);}\)")
